rationale.fidelity: Directly repairs the state-versus-decision error, places allocation before demand, and preserves constraints, served-demand outcome, and expected-value objective.
rationale.managerial_framing: Identifies the planner's actual choice, scarcity, information set, policy comparison, and decision consequence; the trade-off is mostly implicit.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Not requested or claimed; no literature or novelty assertion is made.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Treats distributional fit as an unsupported model assumption and makes no claim of demand control or perfect foresight.
rationale.overall: A complete, economical repair of the proposed narrative.
